name: Card from Banque Misr secured against any other credit card
description: Do you have a credit card from another bank? Now you can benefit more with a credit card from Bank Misr. Without needing to transfer your salary or tie up a certificate/deposit, you can get a card with a credit limit of up to 120% of your current car
full_text:
Card from Banque Misr secured against any other credit card


--- Benefits ---

Do you have a credit card from another bank? Now you can benefit more with a credit card from Bank Misr. Without needing to transfer your salary or tie up a certificate/deposit, you can get a card with a credit limit of up to 120% of your current card.


--- Documents Required from the Customer ---

For Business Customers:

Program Specifications

To apply for a credit card issuance, please visit:

• A clear copy of the valid national ID card along with a recent utility bill receipt.
• Signed request form for issuance.
• Commercial registration or professional license.
• Tax card.
• Customers who possess unsecured credit cards from other banks with a minimum limit of 20,000 EGP.
• The other bank's credit card must be used at least 10% of its credit limit.
• We offer a new credit card to the customer with a maximum limit of up to 120% of the other bank’s credit limit.
• The maximum credit limit on our credit cards is 250,000 EGP.
• Age requirement: 21 to 60 years.
